title: Make resources accessible with digital tools
staff_situations: How do I make resources accessible?
underlying_needs: Structuring documents and slides so assistive technology can read them correctly
Building accessibility into a resource from the start rather than retrofitting it afterwards
Meeting WCAG requirements without needing to become an accessibility specialist

accessibility: Correct heading structure lets screen reader users navigate a document
Alt text and captions give equivalent access to non-text content
Colour contrast checked against WCAG thresholds with a real tool, not eyeballed
inclusive_practice: Benefits every learner using the resource, not only those who have disclosed a need
Removes the need for a bespoke, one-off adapted version made for a single learner

framework_alignment: Digital Skills Framework: accessible document creation
